title: Fit test - 2nd screen "Cancel" during test
scenario: Fit Test cancellation on second screen displays Cancel/Retry options on Voyager Free 60/60+ and Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20 device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Navigate to Audio Settings → Fit Test.
5. Start the Fit Test by tapping the appropriate start button.
6. On the second screen of the Fit Test (where the test is in progress), tap the "Cancel" button.
7. Observe the options displayed at the bottom of the screen.
expected: Tapping "Cancel" on the second screen during a Fit Test interrupts the test and displays "Cancel" and "Retry" options at the bottom of the screen.
